creator: @sethgolie
transcript: I'm starving, you wanna go to Chick-fil-A? Yeah, I'll get the 12-piece grilled nugget, a side mac and cheese, and then ask for a large bowl so I can mix it together and then put buffalo sauce on top and get a Coke Zero. Okay, that's pretty awesome, but what if we went there for breakfast? Yeah, I'll get the egg white grill with the extra grilled sole, a fruit cup, and a diet lemonade. Man, that's awesome. Where did you even learn all that? Bro, are you not following Seth G yet? I'm gonna make sure to follow Seth G right now.
caption: Comment FASTFOOD for my fast food cheat sheet. Steal these two Chick-fil-a orders to stay on track. Lunch order: 12 piece Grilled Nuggets + side Mac'n Cheese + buffalo sauce (mix together in bowl) + Coke Zero (495 calories 49 G protein). Breakfast order: Egg white grill + extra grilled filet + medium fruit cup + Diet Lemonade (520 calories 66 G protein). These will both help you save over 1000 calories. Follow @sethgolie for fast food swaps.
ocr_summary: Lunch: Original 1830 cal/62g protein, Swap 495 cal/49g protein. Breakfast: Original 1490 cal/41g protein, Swap 520 cal/56g protein.

swaps.original_meal: Standard Chick-fil-A lunch combo (fried chicken sandwich with fries and regular drink)
swaps.swap_meal: 12-piece Grilled Nuggets + side Mac'n Cheese + buffalo sauce (mixed in bowl) + Coke Zero

swaps.original_meal: Standard Chick-fil-A breakfast (2 Chicken Biscuits + Hash Browns)
swaps.swap_meal: Egg White Grill + extra grilled filet + medium fruit cup + Diet Lemonade

parsed.notes: Two Chick-fil-A swaps: lunch saves ~1335 cal, breakfast saves ~970 cal. Breakfast swap actually has MORE protein (56g vs 41g) than the original.
